creator: apircalabu@bitdefender.com
text:
cd /usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg && make
You can disable liba52 support by defining WITHOUT_LIBA52

Define WITH_FAAC to enable FAAC codec

Define WITH_FAAD to enable FAAD codec

Define WITH_FREETYPE2 to enable VHOOK drawtext FREETYPE2 codec

Define WITHOUT_IPV6 to disable IPV6 network support

Define WITH_LAME to enable lame MP3 codec

You can enable additional compilation optimizations
by defining WITH_OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS

Define WITH_VORBIS to enable libvorbisenc VORBIS codec

Define WITH_X264 to enable X264 codec

Define WITH_XVID to enable XVID codec
